title: RAHAB'S SISTERS - 211info
text: RAHAB'S SISTERS RAHAB'S SISTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center with access to community meals, a clothing closet, naloxone and fentanyl test strips, safe sex supplies, and access to other community providers. 232 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as women, transgender, or non-binary Hours: Wednesday 2pm-4pm, Thursday 1pm-4pm, Friday 5pm-8pm Email (971) 208-3176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 208-3176 Main phone Main phone (971) 208-3176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet lines 15, 20, and 72 Services: Community Meals * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Community Meals * Women Drop In Centers * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Drop In Centers * Women General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Individuals General Clothing Provision * Women Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution * Women Opioid Antidote Distribution * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Opioid Antidote Distribution * Women Safe Sex Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Safe Sex Supplies * Women Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Specialized Information and Referral * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
